summary: Tested Mock Plaid Link component for bank linking flow. Fixed syntax error in CreatorSettings.jsx (incomplete handleLinkBank function). All Mock Plaid Link features working correctly: bank selection with search, login form, account selection, success message, and bank account persistence.
passed_tests: Frontend: Homepage loads for guests with events carousel
Frontend: Creator Settings page loads with 'Link with Plaid' button
Frontend: Mock Plaid modal opens when clicking 'Link with Plaid'
Frontend: Mock Plaid modal shows bank selection with search functionality
Frontend: Bank search filters banks correctly (tested with 'Chase')
Frontend: Mock Plaid modal shows login form after selecting bank
Frontend: Login form accepts any credentials (demo mode)
Frontend: Mock Plaid modal shows account selection after login
Frontend: Account selection shows Checking and Savings accounts with balances
Frontend: Mock Plaid modal shows success message after linking
Frontend: Bank account is saved and shown on Creator Settings page (Chase - Checking Account •••• 4521)
Frontend: 'Change' button appears after bank is linked
Frontend: Admin login page loads at /admin/login
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads after login with all tabs (Overview, Users, Events, Tickets, Live, Bank)
Backend: Bank account data persisted correctly in database (bank_linked: true, bank_account_mask: 4521, bank_account_name: Checking Account, bank_institution: Chase)
seed_data_creation: Created test creator user with session for testing Mock Plaid Link flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mock Plaid Link component is fully functional. It simulates the real Plaid bank linking flow with 4 steps: bank selection (with search), login (any credentials work), account selection, and success. Bank account data is correctly saved to the database. Admin panel is accessible at /admin/login (not /admin).

mocked_apis.plaid_bank_linking: MOCKED - Uses realistic mock UI flow (MockPlaidLink component) that simulates the real Plaid experience. No actual Plaid API integration.

fixes_applied.issue: Syntax error - incomplete handleLinkBank function with missing catch/finally clause
fixes_applied.fix: Removed the incomplete handleLinkBank function that was causing parsing errors
